name: connaissance
description: Personal knowledge base CLI + MCP — transcription, summarization, entity organization, synthesis, audit, actions. 48 tools mapping to the connaissance CLI subcommands. Requires the connaissance CLI installed via `uv tool install git+https://github.com/guioum/connaissance`. Anthropic API calls (summaries, syntheses) are delegated to the companion MCP `claude-api-mcp` which consumes ANTHROPIC_API_KEY from its own configuration.

cli_path.title: Chemin vers le binaire connaissance
cli_path.description: Chemin absolu vers le binaire connaissance (laisser vide pour auto-détection dans ~/.local/bin/ ou $PATH). Installer via : uv tool install git+https://github.com/guioum/connaissance
